summary: Phase 12 — Referral tracking, Web Push (VAPID + sub/unsub), and Contact form backend — fully tested end-to-end. 14/14 backend pytest tests pass; 7/7 frontend Playwright scenarios pass. Phase 11 regression suite re-run: 25/25 still green. Zero regressions detected.

backend.TestPushSubscribe.test_subscribe_and_ide: PASS (upsert verified — same endpoint stays 1 doc)
backend.TestRegisterWithReferrer.test_invalid_re: PASS (register OK, doc has no referrer_id)
backend.TestReferralEndToEnd.test_first_confirm_: PASS (sponsor +500 tokens, referral_bonus transaction with currency=tokens, referred user flagged paid, sponsor property twin_unlocked=true via='referral')

frontend.STEP2_settings_referral_modal: PASS (referred=3, converted=0, referral-link contains ref=, copy-referral-btn present)
frontend.STEP3_row_push_visible: PASS (data-testid='row-push' visible; copy reflects 'denied' state under headless Chromium, no JS error on render/click)
frontend.STEP4_contact_form_submit: PASS (subject+message → POST /api/support/contact → contact-sent state with CheckCircle2)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3051 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, requests, push, support, referral) for maintainability. Not blocking.

Push delivery itself is not exercised in tests (no real push service in env). The fire-and-forget pattern via asyncio.create_task in notify()→send_web_push was verified to not crash the request flow; full E2E push delivery would need a staging push service.
Referral payout uses currency='tokens' in the transactions collection — confirmed consistent with the assertion contract requested by the spec.
seed_data_creation: Test created transient users prefixed test_phase12_*@test.io, TEST_Phase12_Prop properties, TEST_Phase12_request requests, and TEST_SponsorProp (only if needed). All cleaned up in fixture teardown / inline delete_many.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 surface: GET /api/push/vapid-public-key (public), POST /api/push/{subscribe,unsubscribe} (auth), GET /api/auth/referral, POST /api/support/contact, ?ref= on /register. Frontend testids: referral-banner, referral-modal, referral-modal-close, ref-stat-referred, ref-stat-converted, referral-link, copy-referral-btn, row-push, row-referral, row-contact, contact-subject, contact-message, contact-send, contact-sent. Headless Chromium reports pushSupported()=true but permission is denied — row-push appears with denied copy; no real push delivery happens in CI. Referral payout is keyed by referred user's referral_bonus_paid=true flag, so it is genuinely single-use even across multiple requests.
